design_analysis.zari_rules: Narrow continuous 1-inch gold zari border on edges with scattered micro-dot buttas across the main body field utilizing a fine extra weft technique.
design_analysis.motif_geometry: Linear solid borders framing a field of uniformly distributed 2mm circular buttas, designed for lightweight handloom settings.

scheduler_inputs.title: Mint Sheer Silk-Cotton Festive Ensemble
scheduler_inputs.seasonality_rationale: Perfectly suited for daytime summer weddings and Varamahalakshmi festivities due to its lightweight, breathable pastel aesthetic.
scheduler_inputs.efficiency_rationale: Leverages 100s combed cotton warp combined with mulberry silk weft on existing loom setups, avoiding complex harness re-threading and enabling fast turnaround times across a 15-loom cooperative.
scheduler_inputs.finance_rationale: By restricting premium zari to narrow borders and tiny micro-buttas, we optimize raw material expenditure while retaining a high perceived premium value in urban boutique markets.
